steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the fractional table
steps.content: Enter the two visible points as lists: $x_1=[-11,-1]$ and $y_1=[27+\frac{11}{27},27+\frac{1}{27}]$. Then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=-\frac{1}{27}$ and $b=27$, so the line is $y=-\frac{x}{27}+27$.

steps.title: Find the x-intercept
steps.content: The x-intercept is where $y=0$. From $y=-\frac{x}{27}+27$, set $0=-\frac{x}{27}+27$. Then $\frac{x}{27}=27$, so $x=729$. The intercept is $(729,0)$.
